primary_use_case: Infrastructure refresh with backup and DR
core_pain_point: Customer asks for a low-cost refresh but also wants enterprise-grade resiliency, faster delivery, and minimal operational overhead.
desired_outcome: Clarify the trade-offs and identify what must be confirmed before solution design and BOM work.
notes: Customer says they want HCI, DR, immutable backup, Dell preference, and premium support, but procurement asks to minimize cost and shorten lead time.
